prestazioni: Fully built SR20DET (red top or black top variant) with forged internals: Tomei 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, Tomei Type-M 264° camshafts, and a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.86 A/R turbine housing) running 22 psi on E85 fuel with a custom Haltech Elite 2500 ECU map for 400whp at 7,500 RPM

Full drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way), N1-spec 5-speed transmission with PPG straight-cut gears (1.5:1 1st gear), and a custom 3.9 final drive ratio with a Nismo 2-way differential cover and upgraded axles with CV joints from a Nissan 240SX SE

Suspension overhaul: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for S13 chassis), Cusco front and rear sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear), and polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension full set) with Whiteline adjustable rear camber arms and Nismo front tension rods
estetica: Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit (S13-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser, paired with a Veilside Fortune rear wing (3-piece carbon) and custom 3M matte vinyl wrap in Nissan Heritage Racing Blue (R34 GT-R shade)
Work Meister S1 3-piece wheels (16x9 +15 front, 16x10 +25 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (225/45/16 front, 245/45/16 rear), wrapped in custom gold anodized Work wheel hardware and Nismo lug nuts

Interior stripped and rebuilt with a Bride Zeta III (black Alcantara) driver’s seat, Takata Drift II 4-point harness, Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel (suede), and a custom half-cage (1.75-inch DOM tubing) with bolt-in X-brace by AutoPower Industries, finished with a Defi BF gauge cluster (oil temp, oil pressure, boost) mounted on a custom A-pillar pod
